## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify Jesus's role and identify relevant onboarding support.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role Defined:** Jesus will be Jason's admin assistant, managing his schedule, LinkedIn outreach, and automations.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [**Onboarding Plan:** Jesus will self-onboard via docs/videos, then request specific tool training from Alice as tasks arise.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [**GeekBot Issue:** Jason's stand-up is paused; Alice will contact him to clarify the current async check-in process.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [**Buddy Assignment:** Jason must assign Jesus an onboarding buddy; Alice cannot do this.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

## Topics

### Role & Onboarding Plan

  - [**Role:** Jesus's duties are to assist Jason with:](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
      - [LinkedIn outreach](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Schedule management](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Administrative tasks](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Automations](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Onboarding Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [Jesus will first review all company docs and videos.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [This self-onboarding will reveal specific training needs.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [Alice will then provide targeted training on relevant tools (e.g., Fathom) upon request.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

### GeekBot Stand-up

  - [**Problem:** Jason's async stand-up is paused in GeekBot.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [**Significance:** This blocks Jesus from participating in team updates.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Action:** Alice will contact Jason to confirm the current check-in process.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

### Onboarding Buddy

  - [**Process:** Managers assign onboarding buddies.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**Action:** Jesus must ask Jason to assign him a buddy.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jesus:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [Review all onboarding docs and videos.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [Request specific tool training from Alice as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [Ask Jason to assign an onboarding buddy.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**Alice:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [Contact Jason to clarify the current async check-in process.](https://fathom.video/share/GsTWVBzrsyzuPfdEhuHPmbYpm3SY3gCs?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
